positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a magnificent celestial cityscape at dawn. The central elements are glowing, bioluminescent flora and intricate, towering crystalline structures that emerge from a calm, mirrored body of water. The sky is a gradient blend of soft lavender, deep indigo, and warm apricot, casting a soft, ethereal glow on the scene. The flora features highly detailed, stylized leaves and glowing mushrooms in emerald green and sapphire blue. The overall aesthetic is Art Nouveau meets futuristic fantasy, with clean, sharp silhouettes and a strong, high-contrast composition suitable for a centered print. Minimalistic text and clean edges are essential.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, graffiti, cartoonish, blurry edges, distorted, messy, ugly, jpeg artifacts
